history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with dark, curly hair and glasses stands in the foreground, looking slightly to his right. He's wearing a black sleeveless shirt and a silver chain necklace. Behind him is a brightly lit basketball arena with empty tiered seating. The court is visible, featuring the "FIBA BASKETBALL WORLD CUP 2023" branding and "JAKARTA" displayed prominently. The overall color palette is a mix of the warm wood tones of the court, the blue and orange accents of the branding, and the neutral grays and whites of the seating. The lighting is bright and even, typical of an indoor sports venue. The mood is calm and observational, with the man appearing relaxed amidst the grandeur of the arena.

---

Seorang pria muda Asia dengan rambut keriting gelap dan berkacamata berdiri di latar depan, melihat sedikit ke kanannya. Dia mengenakan kaus tanpa lengan hitam dan kalung rantai perak. Di belakangnya adalah arena bola basket yang terang dengan tempat duduk bertingkat yang kosong. Lapangan terlihat, menampilkan merek "FIBA BASKETBALL WORLD CUP 2023" dan "JAKARTA" yang terlihat jelas. Palet warna keseluruhan adalah campuran nada kayu hangat dari lapangan, aksen biru dan oranye dari branding, serta warna abu-abu dan putih netral dari tempat duduk. Pencahayaan terang dan merata, khas arena olahraga dalam ruangan. Suasananya tenang dan observasional, dengan pria itu tampak santai di tengah kemegahan arena.
